textByHash.13683912c883bfc845dca7cb93a84da6e4625f14: Well, if you do ever find yourself in need of the finest Hunter equipment available, then you know where to come.
textByHash.7ca35397d2bf8aa01ba86820d1af4d3b45ec7399: Would you like me to show you our range of equipment? Or was there something specific you were after?
textByHash.9ea11af42ea8cc2919d28e62fc768698026e0c6a: Him? I think he might be crazy. Either that or he's seeking attention.
textByHash.c4421422e8fcaab6c0bcc85214dfaee3139fa905: Hello, hello, and a most warm welcome to my Hunter Emporium. We have everything the discerning Hunter could need.
textByHash.f4265aa1fc69e99a5bfb7c6f6c714e29d27660c5: He keeps trying to sell me these barmy looking weapons he's invented. I can't see them working, personally.
